site.title: Candela Kucar Latú
site.description: Argentine product designer with 8+ years of experience shaping B2C and SaaS products from strategy to the final pixel.

about.headline: Candela is a product designer
about.body: with 8+ years of experience, shaping B2C and SaaS products from strategy to the final pixel.
bodyLines: from strategy to the final pixel.

aboutSheet.bio1: I'm a Product Designer from Buenos Aires with 8+ years of experience working end-to-end on B2C and SaaS products.
aboutSheet.bio2: Most recently I led the strategy and design of a city-scale game for Las Vegas — joining when it was just an idea and seeing it through: team alignment, game mechanics, roadmap, and final visual design. Before that, I worked at Intive on products you've probably used — Scribd, SlideShare, Kaplan, and BlackBerry.

principles.title: Use research to decide, not to validate.
principles.body: By the time I run a study, I already know the question and what we'll do with the answer.

principles.title: Work end-to-end.
principles.body: Not because I want to own everything, but because the handoff is where things break.

principles.title: Ship to learn.
principles.body: I'd rather ship something imperfect and learn than spend a sprint perfecting a bet we haven't tested.

principles.title: Treat efficiency as a design problem.
principles.body: That means using AI to shrink the gap between decision and artifact, giving developers more context and fewer back-and-forth rounds.
